ordersText.title: THE GRUDGE
ordersText.general: At the start of a combat initiated as a result of this order, if you have less materiel than your opponent, gain 1 materiel. *newline* LIMIT ONCE PER ROUND.

ordersText.title: TIRELESS WORKERS
ordersText.general: When you resolve this order you may spend 1 reinforcement token or destroy a friendly unit to gain 2 materiel. *newline* LIMIT ONCE PER ROUND.

ordersText.title: FLEXIBLE ECONOMY
ordersText.general: After you resolve this order you may spend any amount of materiel to gain 1 cache token for every 2 materiel spent. *newline* LIMIT ONCE PER ROUND.

ordersText.title: DEVASTATING BOMBARDMENT
ordersText.general: During this orbital strike, gain 1 [D] and you may spend 1 [M] to place a forge token on the target world. *newline* LIMIT ONCE PER ROUND.

ordersText.title: TARGETIG ARRAY
ordersText.general: Enemy bastions do not prevent this orbital strike. Before rolling the dice during this orbital strike, you may gain up to 3 [B] by spending 1 materiel per each [B]. *newline* LIMIT ONCE PER ROUND.

eventsText.title: EMERGENCY FUNDS
eventsText.general: *newpara* Place this card in your play area and discard all of your other schemes. *newpara* Discard this scheme at the start of a combat to gain 4 materiel. After the combat ends, you must set your materiel counter to 0.

eventsText.title: ACCELERATED MINING
eventsText.general: *newpara* Place this card in your play area and discard all of your other schemes. *newpara* Discard this card after you win a combat on a world. Gain assets from this world and gain materiel equal to its materiel value plus 1.

eventsText.title: PLANNED WITHDRAWAL
eventsText.general: *newpara* Place this card in your play area and discard all of your other schemes. *newpara* Discard this card at the beginning of a combat round when you are defending to rally all friendly units, take them and place them on a friendly world in the active or an adjacent system. Then, if the combat area is a world, destroy all buildings there and place a forge token on it.

eventsText.title: OUTWARD EXPEDITIONS
eventsText.general: *newpara* Place this card in your play area and discard all of your other schemes. *newpara* While this card is in your play area, whenever you reveal an order token, you may spend 1 materiel to place it on your Event deck. Resolve the order as usual.

eventsText.title: OPEN TO TRADE
eventsText.general: *newpara* Exchange any of your assets for assets of any other types. If you have none, gain any one asset.

eventsText.title: TRADE WAR
eventsText.general: *newpara* Choose another player and spend any amount of materiel. The chosen player loses the same amount of materiel.

eventsText.title: SETTLED WORLDS
eventsText.general: *newpara* Purchase a combat upgrade, reducing its cost by 1 for every system that has a world with a forge token on it.

eventsText.title: EXPLOSIVES
eventsText.general: *newpara* Destroy 1 unit or building on a world with a forge token.

combatText.title: HUN-TR MODULE
combatText.general: Find a copy of this card in your hand or in your combat deck and play it.

combatText.title: IRONSKEIN
combatText.general: Find a copy of this card in your hand or in your combat deck and play it.

combatText.title: GRIMNYR'S GUIDANCE
combatText.general: Draw a card. *newpara* If you are defending, gain 1 [B] or 1 [S] and you may retreat 1 of your units. *newpara* If you are attacking, either rally a friendly unit or rout a friendly unit to gain 1 materiel and immediately play another card.

combatText.title: ANCESTRAL SENTENCE
combatText.general: Spend up to 2 materiel to gain 2 (B) for each materiel spent.
combatText.unit: Hearthkin Warrior/Bastion Commerce Vessel: Discard another of your combat cards in play to gain 1 [S] or 1 [M].

combatText.title: VOID ARMOUR
combatText.general: Spend up to 2 materiel to gain 2 (S) for each materiel spent.
combatText.unit: Hearthkin Warrior/Bastion Commerce Vessel: Discard another of your combat cards in play to gain 1 [B] or 1 [M].

combatText.title: TECHNOLOGIES OF THE DARK AGE
combatText.general: Retreat 1 of your units. *newpara* Choose any 1 card from your Combat Upgrades deck, regardless of its Command Level, and pay its upgrade cost to immediately play it. After the end of the combat, you must return the chosen card to the upgrade deck.

combatText.title: MECHANIZED BACKUP
combatText.unit: Einhyr Hearthguard: Spend 4 materiel to place a free Sagitaur on this world. After the Determine the Winner phase, destroy a friendly unit with the highest CL among unrouted friendly units on this world..

combatText.title: THE HEARTH BURNS
combatText.unit: Einhyr Hearthguard/Bastion Commerce Vessel: Discard any number of cards in play (including this card). You may return any of those cards to your hand instead of discarding them by spending 1 materiel per each one. Gain 1 [B] for every discarded card, and additionally gain 1 (B) for every discarded card with a shield icon..

combatText.title: WISDOM OF THE VOTANN
combatText.general: Spend 1 [S] to draw a card. *newline* Rally a unit. *newline* Either gain 1 (S) for every [S] you have, or gain 1 [S].
combatText.unit: Einhyr Hearthguard/Bastion Commerce Vessel: Spend 1 materiel to play another card without resolving its abilities but gaining its combat icons until the end of the combat. If you are attacking, you may spend 1 materiel to resolve its unit abilities.

Sagitaur/Stronghold Commerce Vessel: Reroll any of your [D] once by spending 1 materiel per each [D]. For each [S] rolled, force your opponent to lose 1 [S], for each [B] rolled, force your opponent to lose 1 [B]. For each [M] rolled, gain 1 [D].

combatText.title: KAHL
combatText.general: Draw a card. *newpara* You may choose a card in your hand and spend materiel equal to the number of combat icons it has. If you did, find a copy of that card in your hand or in your deck and play both cards, without resolving their abilities but gaining their combat icons until the end of the combat.

combatText.title: SUPERIOR CRAFTSMANSHIP
combatText.general: Until the end of this combat, whenever a card ability requires you to spend materiel, spend 1 less materiel.
combatText.unit: Sagitaur/Stronghold Commerce Vessel: Lose up to 3 of your dice. Then spend up to 3 materiel to gain 1 [B] for each materiel spent.

combatText.title: MIGHT OF THE FORGE
combatText.unit: Colossus/Stronghold Commerce Vessel: Choose an enemy unit and spend materiel equal to its cost. Destroy that unit after the next assess damage step.

combatText.title: INCREDIBLE WEALTH
combatText.unit: Colossus/Stronghold Commerce Vessel: Gain 1 materiel for each unrouted enemy unit.
